overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a character navigating a dark, flooded shantytown at night. The character moves through murky water and across wooden walkways between makeshift shacks under a hazy, moonlit sky, creating a tense atmospheric horror setting.

agents.ego_description: navigating through narrow dark passages between wooden shacks and corrugated metal structures

entered.detail: dark wooden shack with slanted roof visible on the left side
wall made of corrugated metal sheets on the right side
tall wooden pole rising above the shacks in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character moves through extremely narrow, dark corridors between makeshift wooden shacks. The sky is mostly obscured by the surrounding structures, creating a claustrophobic atmosphere with very low visibility.

scene_state.functional_zone: open flooded area with moonlit water reflections

events.description: exits narrow corridor into open flooded area with visible sky
moon becomes visible through clouds, casting pale light on water surface

agents.ego_description: wading through shallow water in the open flooded shantytown area, moving toward distant structures

entered.detail: flooded water covering the ground with moonlight reflections
pale moon visible through cloudy night sky
silhouette of trees visible on the horizon beyond the shacks

segments.scene_description: The scene opens up into a wide flooded area where the character wades through water reflecting the moonlight. The sky is now fully visible with the moon providing the primary light source, and distant trees line the horizon.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated wooden walkways and stairs over water

events.description: character begins ascending wooden stairs to reach elevated walkway

agents.ego_description: climbing wooden stairs and traversing elevated walkways above the flood water

entered.detail: rickety wooden stairs leading up to elevated platform
rough wooden railing along the edge of the walkway

segments.scene_description: The character climbs onto elevated wooden walkways and stairs, rising above the water level. Wooden railings line the path as the character moves along the raised platforms, with the flooded area now visible below to the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: approach to lit stilt house along waterfront

events.description: approaching a stilt house with warm artificial light visible in the windows

agents.ego_description: moving along the waterfront walkway toward the illuminated stilt house

entered.detail: wooden house on stilts with warm yellow light glowing from windows
wooden bridge structure connecting walkways over the water

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a stilt house with warm light glowing from its windows, providing the first artificial light source in the scene. The walkway continues alongside the water toward a wooden bridge structure, with the lit building serving as a focal point in the dark environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a claustrophobic shantytown that gradually opens into a moonlit flooded expanse before ascending toward a lit sanctuary. It begins by navigating extremely narrow, dark corridors between makeshift wooden shacks where the sky is almost entirely obscured. As the character emerges from these tight spaces, the scene opens into a wide flooded area where the moonlight reflects off the murky water and distant trees line the horizon. The camera then rises as the character climbs elevated wooden walkways and stairs, leaving the water below to the left while following the line of wooden railings. Finally, the path leads toward a wooden bridge and a stilt house, where warm light glowing from the windows provides a sharp contrast to the surrounding nocturnal darkness.
